fields.label: Website Sections
fields.name: components
fields.instructions: These are the sections that build your website.

sub_fields.label: Background Content
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: This can be either a video or a full size image. This image or video should reflect the desired outcome of your client and match the heading below. As an example, if you were a marriage coach, you would have a video or image of a happily married couple. The maximum file size is 5MB.

sub_fields.label: Subheading
sub_fields.name: subheading
sub_fields.instructions: This subheading sits above your heading and helps your SEO of your webpage. If you are a coach that operates in a particular area we recommend appending this to what your coaching specialism is.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: The heading should be short and concise (maximum 5 - 6 words) and should be focused on the Universal Desired Outcome of your client. i.e "Rescue and revive your marriage"

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: This should describe how you help your customers followed by the desired outcome of your clients. It should reflect the heading above. I.e One to one coaching to save your marriage.
sub_fields.placeholder: i.e. One-to-One Coaching to save your marriage

sub_fields.label: Primary CTA Button
sub_fields.name: primary_cta_button
sub_fields.instructions: This should point users to your main page you want them to end up at. Typically, this would be your Discovery Call page.

sub_fields.label: Secondary CTA Button
sub_fields.name: secondary_cta_button
sub_fields.instructions: This should point users to your main page you want them to end up at. Typically, this would be your Discovery Call page.

sub_fields.label: Key Benefits
sub_fields.name: key_benefits
sub_fields.instructions: Write 3 key benefits or outcomes that your clients will experience when completing your coaching programme.

sub_fields.instructions: This will override the default colour set in the Theme Settings (Within the Components Folder)
